title: [P0] Verify intervals-icu-mcp server boots cleanly
description: Smoke test: 'uv run --directory mcp-servers/intervals-icu-mcp intervals-icu-mcp --help' shows FastMCP banner without errors. Confirms submodule sync and Python env work. Doesn't verify API calls — that requires credentials (see precond tickets).

title: [P0] Write README.md with quickstart
description: Project intro, architecture-at-a-glance substrate table, 6-step quickstart (clone --recurse-submodules, cp .env.example, uv sync submodule, edit profile.yaml, declare goal, open Claude Code). Build-phase map and design invariants recap. Points at the plan file as authoritative spec.

title: [P0] Commit beads setup (.beads/, AGENTS.md, .gitattributes)
description: Beads initialized with 'tempo' prefix. Commit AGENTS.md, .beads/config.yaml, .beads/.gitignore, .beads/README.md, .gitattributes (bd merge strategy). .beads/beads.db is already gitignored by bd's local rules. Also commit .beads/issues.jsonl after first 'bd sync --flush-only'.

title: [P0 PRECOND] Fill athlete/profile.yaml with real values
description: Template has TODO placeholders. Need real FTP (from recent 20-min or ramp test), LTHR, run threshold pace, CSS swim pace, max/resting HR, weight, and current PRs. Without these the zone-based decision rules (Z2 by HR, power zones by %FTP) degenerate. Can cross-check against intervals.icu settings — 'coach sync' in Phase 1 can auto-seed from there.

title: [P0] Write .claude/settings.json with intervals MCP wiring
description: MCP server config pointing to ./mcp-servers/intervals-icu-mcp with script name 'intervals-icu-mcp'. Env vars INTERVALS_ICU_API_KEY/ATHLETE_ID. coach-db and strava stubbed under _disabledMcpServers_phase3. Minimal permissions allowlist for common read-only ops.

title: [P0] Seed athlete/preferences.md
description: Coaching style (structured periodization + LLM judgment; consistency over hero sessions; explain the why), schedule/logistics placeholders, hard constraints (respect injury log, HRV trend, long-run progression cap), soft preferences, nutrition pointer. User refines as they train.

title: Phase 0: Scaffold + intervals MCP
description: Initial scaffolding per /home/seanm/.claude/plans/take-this-project-and-temporal-tarjan.md. Goal: repo is ready for useful planning conversations with intervals.icu data live through MCP. Milestone = 'can open Claude Code in repo and have planning conversations using intervals data directly'.

title: [P0] Write .gitignore
description: Ignore: .env (keep .env.example), data/coach.db*, data/vectors/, data/raw/, data/events.jsonl, __pycache__/, .venv/, *.egg-info/, .claude/settings.local.json, editor/OS junk. Critical so derived data and secrets never land in git.

title: [P0] Seed athlete/goals.yaml stub
description: Parallel to race-calendar.yaml for non-race goals (FTP target, PR attempt). Added per plan update covering goal-in / bootstrap-plan flow. Goals with target_date get phase back-calculation; open-ended gets rolling 12-week blocks.

title: [P0] Write .env.example with correct intervals env var names
description: Template for intervals.icu credentials (INTERVALS_ICU_API_KEY, INTERVALS_ICU_ATHLETE_ID) matching eddmann/intervals-icu-mcp upstream. Also Strava placeholders for Phase 3.

title: [P0 PRECOND] Declare at least one race or goal
description: Add an A-race to athlete/race-calendar.yaml OR a goal to athlete/goals.yaml. Without this, bootstrap-plan (Phase 4) has nothing to plan around. For now, just needed so conversational mode has concrete context. Ironman date was deliberately left as stub in plan — user to fill at implementation time.

title: [P0] Seed athlete/race-calendar.yaml stub
description: Empty races: [] with commented example showing priority (A/B/C), distance taxonomy, expected conditions, goal times. Plan says STUB — user fills in the A-race later.

title: [P0 GAP] Add custom get_week_summary and bulk_upsert_tagged tools to fork
description: Plan §'intervals-icu-mcp (fork of eddmann)' calls for: (1) get_week_summary(week_id) returning planned+actual+wellness in one call, shaped for plan-training-week preflight; (2) bulk_upsert_tagged(events[], plan_id) for round-trip attribution via custom-field tagging. Depends on fork being set up first. Defer until Phase 4 actually needs these.

title: [P0 PRECOND] Create intervals.icu API credentials and populate .env
description: User action: (1) visit https://intervals.icu/settings Developer section, (2) copy athlete ID (iNNNNNN) and API key, (3) cp .env.example .env and fill both values. Blocks the Phase 0 milestone verification ticket. Sean-only — I cannot do this.

title: [P0] Add eddmann/intervals-icu-mcp as git submodule
description: Submodule at mcp-servers/intervals-icu-mcp pointing to upstream (NOT forked yet — see gap ticket). uv sync inside submodule completes; uv run intervals-icu-mcp boots cleanly (FastMCP 2.12.4, MCP SDK 1.17.0). 40+ tools per upstream CLAUDE.md.

title: [P0 GAP] End-to-end verify milestone: live planning conversation with intervals data
description: Plan's Phase 0 milestone: 'can open Claude Code in repo and have useful planning conversations using intervals data directly'. Requires (1) credentials in .env, (2) intervals MCP listed by Claude Code (/mcp), (3) a test query like 'what was my last activity?' returning real data. NOT YET VERIFIED — credentials not set up yet. Close when verified.

title: [P0 GAP] Fork eddmann/intervals-icu-mcp and switch submodule URL
description: Plan specifies forking upstream so custom tools (get_week_summary, bulk_upsert_tagged) can be added without waiting on upstream PRs. Currently submodule points at upstream directly. Steps: (1) gh repo fork eddmann/intervals-icu-mcp; (2) update .gitmodules URL to Sean's fork; (3) git submodule sync; (4) verify 'git submodule status' shows fork URL. Not blocking Phase 0 milestone but blocks Phase 4 custom tools.

title: [P0] Initialize git repository at /home/seanm/repos/tempo
description: git init with main branch. Bootstraps the repo for all downstream Phase 0 work.

title: [P0] Create directory skeleton
description: Directories: .claude/{commands,skills/{bootstrap-plan,plan-training-week,review-week,ingest-research,draft-race-plan,morning-check-in}}, athlete/, knowledge/{methodology,nutrition,research}/, plans/, journal/, data/{vectors,raw/{intervals,strava}}/, mcp-servers/, scripts/, dashboards/. Matches plan's repository layout exactly.

title: [P0] Initialize uv Python project (3.11+)
description: Run uv init --name tempo --python 3.11 --package to generate pyproject.toml and src/tempo/ package layout. Script entrypoint set to 'coach = tempo.cli:main'. Deps populated per-phase, base project lean.

title: [P0] Seed athlete/profile.yaml template
description: Template with TODO placeholders for FTP, LTHR, run threshold pace, CSS pace, max/resting HR, weight, zones (bike power Coggan 7-zone, run HR Friel 7-zone), PRs, strengths, limiters. User fills in real values before first planning conversation.

title: [P0] Write .claude/CLAUDE.md coach system prompt
description: Always-loaded coach context: directory conventions, tool routing (coach-db first, intervals for fresh/writes, strava for segments), invariants (no autonomous intervals writes, always log decisions, structured+semantic retrieval), daily/weekly rhythm. References the plan file as authoritative spec.

title: [P0] Seed athlete/injury-log.md
description: Running log template for active and resolved niggles. Active-flag entry format (status, onset, symptoms, constraints, rehab, next-review). Decision rule R-5 makes this the highest-priority input to weekly planning.
